episodes.title: Epstein-Trump Files PROJECTED on Washington DC Hotel ahead of BIGGEST PRESS NIGHT
episodes.description:
Just hours before one of Washington's biggest nights of the year, someone made sure the Epstein files weren't going to be ignored. Documents and photos linking Jeffrey Epstein to President Trump were projected directly onto the façade of the Washington D.C. Hilton — the same hotel hosting the White House Correspondents' Dinner Gala — on Friday night. 

The timing was no accident. Trump is expected to attend the dinner Saturday for the first time since returning to the presidency, having previously boycotted the event during his first term. The projection drew crowds, cameras and immediate social media attention, turning the sidewalk outside the Hilton into its own news story before the dinner even began. Washington hasn't seen anything quite like it.

#donaldtrump #epsteinfiles #epsteinscandal #washingtondc

episodes.title: Mystery artists INSTALL Trump–Epstein “TITANIC” SCULPTURE in Washington, D.C.
episodes.description:
A new art installation by the anonymous artist collective Secret Handshake has appeared on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., depicting figures representing former U.S. president Donald Trump and disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein.

The installation, titled “King of the World,” recreates the famous bow scene from the movie Titanic, where the characters stand with arms outstretched over the ship.

Plaques placed alongside the sculpture reference allegations of social connections between Trump and Epstein, while large banners featuring images of the two men together are displayed as part of the installation.

The provocative artwork has quickly drawn attention from passersby and sparked debate online about political art, satire, and public installations in the U.S. capital.

#donaldtrump #epsteinfiles #epsteinscandal #washingtondc
